title: Fundraising Legal Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger fundraising legal foundations judgment so legal / risk work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Fundraising Legal Foundations is a leverage point inside legal / risk. It supports the broader goal of contracts, ip, privacy, liabilities, and regulatory awareness.
coreConcepts: Fundraising Legal Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good fundraising legal foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Fundraising Legal Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
